calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR SHORT CAUSE
Off Calendar Sep-29-2014 Vacated

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-12-2014 Set For Trial On Oct-27-14 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Ntc Of Application And Hearing For Right To Attach Order; Order For Issuance Of Writ Of Attachment; Application For Right To Attach Order; Order For Issuance Of Writ Of Attachment After Hearing
Off Calendar Apr-25-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances:
Christopher J. Olson, Esq. of Sweeney Mason Wilson & Bosomworth, Tel. 408.356.3000, for plaintiff and moving party;
John Chu, Esq. of Corporate Counsel Law Group LLP, Tel. 415.989.5300, for defendant and opposing party.

RULING: A R G U E D. The Court did not allow additional evidence at the hearing. At the conclusion of argument, PLAINTIFF JOAN FRANCIS'S Application For Right To Attach Order and Order For Issuance Of Writ Of Attachment is denied. Plaintiff has not established probable validity of the claim. Defendant's request for judicial notice is granted. (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order.) Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Reporter: Sherry Sawyer CSR# 5976.
